title: ai_ops_audit stream v1
description: AI Ops consulting audit lifecycle events. Emitted by ai-ops-consulting/audits/pipeline.py whenever an audit is generated, delivered, or fails. One event_type per lifecycle stage. Joining key is `audit_id` (e.g. aoa_<12hex>).

audit_id.description: Stable audit identifier issued by AuditPayload at construction time.

tier.description: Pricing tier the audit belongs to. tier_1 ($3,500 flat) is the only tier shipping today.

phase.description: Lifecycle stage. completed = the full pipeline (render + deliver + status update) succeeded. failed = pipeline raised before completing.

client_business_name.description: Plain-text business name. Useful for human-readable replay; never the recipient email.

client_email_hash.description: SHA-256(client_email)[:N]. Lets you correlate audit -> send-event without storing PII.

price_usd.description: Engagement price in USD. tier_1 default is 3500.

deliverable_paths.description: Local filesystem paths to the rendered artifacts. URLs may be added in a future minor.

deliverable_links.description: Public URLs for the deliverables included in the delivery email body. Optional.

send_outcome.description: Sender Gate outcome on the delivery email (only meaningful for phase=delivered/delivery_blocked/delivery_error).

send_block_label.description: If the gate blocked the delivery, which step + label fired.

dry_run.description: True when delivery used a noop provider (synthetic test, shadow mode).

duration_ms.description: Pipeline wall-clock duration. Only meaningful on phase=completed/failed.
